title: resync_sessions missing Payee/Sent arm
description: Trigger: payee receives PaymentAction::Sent, DB upsert records Payee/Sent state, then CLI crashes before auto-confirm fires. On restart, all_sessions loads Payee/Sent. resync_sessions has no arm for (Payee, Sent) — it falls through to _ => continue. Bad behavior: payer never receives Confirmed; payment appears stalled indefinitely from payer's perspective. Fix: add (PaymentRole::Payee, PaymentState::Sent) arm that broadcasts PaymentAction::Confirmed to the peer.
close_reason: Fixed: added (Payee, Sent) arm to resync_sessions that retransmits PaymentAction::Confirmed{tx_hash}. Tests: resync_payee_sent_retransmits_confirmed_action (MLS roundtrip) and resync_payee_sent_no_tx_hash_is_skipped (defensive guard).
